title: 🧊 Exotic Symmetries (Beyond Euclidean)
name: Exotic Symmetries (Beyond Euclidean)
what_it_is: Symmetries that don’t obey traditional mirror, radial, or translational rules—includes hyperbolic, conformal, and twisted multidimensional invariants.
how_to_use: her form echoes exotic symmetry—twisted space spirals into self with no true mirror
the temple walls warp with conformal logic—balance held in curving irrational geometry
animation_behavior: Warped repetition, mirrored elements curve and blend, symmetry blooms off-axis ---
